isolation: one MemPhant tenant/scope/actor identity per period/persona
runtime_contract: retrieve independently for each sealed query
record non-degraded trace and evidence digest
freeze server and worker behavior environment before launch
validate actual served model, provider, usage, and cost from every reader response
atomically ledger provider attempt start and result before cache/checkpoint return
require checkpoint attempt history as an exact prefix of the run ledger
bind output and attempt-ledger paths into the generation fingerprint
publish reader cache entries by atomic replace
enforce cumulative provider attempts and reported cost across checkpoint resumes
write answer and proof checkpoints atomically

temporal_contract.evaluation_snapshot: final state after full period/persona ingest and reflection drain
temporal_contract.session_date_use: chronological ordering, retained dialogue text, and the explicit half-open group aggregation window
